title: Change logo background from mosaic/white to bluish

requirements.summary: Replace the logo background in the Header component from white/mosaic to a bluish color that complements the dark cosmic theme
acceptanceCriteria: The logo area in the Header no longer has a white or mosaic-patterned background.
The logo background is visibly bluish and harmonizes with the dark cosmic theme.
The logo image and text remain clearly visible against the new blue background.
The change is consistent across desktop and mobile views.

file_operations.description: Update the logo container styling to replace any white, light, or mosaic-patterned background with a deep or medium blue tone (e.g., #1a3a6b or cosmic blue). Apply the new blue background to the logo wrapper element while ensuring the logo image and text remain clearly visible. Verify the styling works consistently across both desktop and mobile views and harmonizes with the existing dark cosmic theme.
